parameters.query:
SELECT * FROM _learnersRaw
WHERE stage = 'S2'
AND status = 'new'
ORDER BY created_at ASC;

UPDATE _learnersRaw
SET normalized_url = '{{ $json.normalized_url }}',
    stage = '{{ $json.stage }}',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE record_id = '{{ $json.record_id }}';

INSERT INTO normalisation_log
(record_id, from_stage, to_stage,
 action, result, message)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.record_id }}',
  'S2', '{{ $json.stage }}',
  'url_normalisation',
  '{{ $json.norm_status }}',
  'URL: {{ $json.normalized_url }}'
);

SELECT record_id, source_url, 
       normalized_url, stage
FROM _learnersRaw
WHERE normalized_url IS NOT NULL
AND stage = 'S3'
ORDER BY created_at ASC;

SELECT * FROM _learnersRaw
WHERE stage = 'S3'
AND normalized_url IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY created_at ASC;

UPDATE _learnersRaw
SET learner_id = '{{ $json.learner_id }}',
    stage = 'S3',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE record_id = '{{ $json.record_id }}';

-- Find duplicate normalized URLs
WITH ranked AS (
    SELECT
        id,
        record_id,
        normalized_url,
        full_name,
        email,
        created_at,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY normalized_url
            ORDER BY created_at ASC
        ) AS rn,
        COUNT(*) OVER (
            PARTITION BY normalized_url
        ) AS url_count
    FROM _learnersRaw
    WHERE stage = 'S3'
    AND normalized_url IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT * FROM ranked
WHERE url_count > 1
ORDER BY normalized_url, rn;

UPDATE _learnersRaw
SET stage = 'S4',
    is_duplicate = {{ $json.is_duplicate }},
    merged_into = '{{ $json.primary_record_id }}',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE record_id = '{{ $json.record_id }}';

SELECT
    p.record_id AS primary_id,
    p.normalized_url,
    p.full_name AS primary_name,
    p.email AS primary_email,
    p.phone AS primary_phone,
    p.company AS primary_company,
    p.job_title AS primary_title,
    p.learner_id AS primary_learner_id,

    d.record_id AS dup_id,
    d.full_name AS dup_name,
    d.email AS dup_email,
    d.phone AS dup_phone,
    d.company AS dup_company,
    d.job_title AS dup_title

FROM _learnersRaw p
INNER JOIN _learnersRaw d
    ON p.normalized_url = d.normalized_url
    AND p.record_id != d.record_id
    AND d.is_duplicate = TRUE

WHERE p.stage = 'S4'
AND p.is_duplicate = FALSE

ORDER BY p.normalized_url;





UPDATE _learnersRaw
SET stage = 'S5',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE stage = 'S4';

UPDATE _learnersRaw
SET crm_ready = {{ $json.crm_ready }},
    stage = '{{ $json.stage }}',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE record_id = '{{ $json.record_id }}';


SELECT * FROM _learnersRaw
WHERE stage = 'S6'
AND crm_ready = TRUE
ORDER BY created_at ASC;

UPDATE _learnersRaw
SET stage = 'S7',
    status = 'completed',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE record_id = '{{ $json.record_id }}'
AND crm_ready = TRUE;


INSERT INTO pipeline_log
(record_id, from_stage, to_stage,
 action, result, message)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.record_id }}',
  'S6', 'S7',
  'pipeline_complete',
  'success',
  'Learner: {{ $json.full_name }} | ID: {{ $json.learner_id }}'
);
